creator: mark@grondar.za
text:
This has already been addressed (and fixed) in PR-5642.

M

Makoto MATSUSHITA wrote:
> 		a) ${PREFIX}/sbin/ndc assumes the pathname of named is
> 		  "/usr/sbin/named". This is NOT bind8's named.
> 		b) ${PREFIX}/sbin/named assumes the pathname of
> 		  named-xfer is "/usr/libexec/named-xfer". This is NOT
> 		  bind8's named-xfer.
--
Mark Murray
